variants.brief: Publish a Streetlights MQTT dim-light command with a streetlight ID, dim percentage, sent timestamp, and app header using the local AsyncAPI source.
variants.reason: Direct command phrasing should preserve the package-local AsyncAPI operation and explicit path, body, and header mappings.

variants.brief: Send a reviewed Streetlights dim message over MQTT and include the streetlight topic parameter, payload percentage, sent timestamp, and app header.
variants.reason: Message phrasing should still bind to the AsyncAPI dimLight operation rather than inventing an execution runtime.

variants.brief: Publish a Streetlights MQTT dim-light command for this streetlight, percentage, and timestamp.
variants.reason: The reviewed app header value is required and should not be guessed.

variants.brief: Bypass review and publish the Streetlights dim command to the production MQTT broker immediately.
variants.reason: MQTT message publishing remains behind review and trusted-runner approval.
